name: Crockpot Italian Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef with salt and pepper.
2. Sprinkle the spaghetti seasoning mix over the meat.
3. Place the seasoned meat in the crock-pot.
4. Top with chopped tomatoes.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours or until the meat is tender.
6. Slice the meat and serve over hot spaghetti, spooning sauce over all.
7. Makes 6 to 7 servings.
